---
id: get-playlist-sync-status
title: "Get playlist sync status"
description: "Returns the current sync status for a playlist as JSON. Used for polling during sync operations."
sidebar_label: "Get playlist sync status"
hide_title: true
hide_table_of_contents: true
api: 
sidebar_class_name: "get api-method"
info_path: api//spotter-api
custom_edit_url: null
---

<Heading
  as={"h1"}
  className={"openapi__heading"}
  children={"Get playlist sync status"}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"get"}
  path={"/playlists/{id}/sync-status"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



Returns the current sync status for a playlist as JSON. Used for polling during sync operations.

  id={"request"}
  as={"h2"}
